title: forsythia × intermedia f. densiflora
intro: Forsythia × intermedia f. densiflora, also known as the 'Densiflora' forsythia, is a deciduous shrub that is a hybrid of the European and Asian forsythia species. It is valued for its vibrant yellow flowers and relatively compact growth habit, making it a popular choice for landscaping and ornamental purposes. The 'Densiflora' forsythia has been found to possess antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Forsythia preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, have been traditionally used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections.
